SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (72231872.pdf)
SUMMARY: 9 years of experience in Human Resources, benefit administration, employee relations, recruitment and on-boarding, training and development, payroll administration (11 years), customer relations (18 years), and retail management (9 years).
SKILLS: Benefits Administration, Employee Relations, Human Resources, Payroll Administration, Training & Development, Recruitment, HRIS, Microsoft Office Programs, Leadership Skills, Leadership Development, Marketing, Customer Service, Administrative and Support, Taxation, Payroll Reporting, Employee Records Management, Budgeting, Office Operations

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2015 - Present
DESCRIPTION: Provides HR support for various locations. Manages plant HR personnel in both union and non-union environments. Acts as liaison between HR personnel and benefit vendors. Processes employee changes on HRIS. Responsible for recruiting, payroll processing, and recognition programs.

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 09/2014 - 06/2015
DESCRIPTION: Provides day-to-day HR support for approximately 150 employees. Coordinates recruiting process and manages leave programs. Administers company personnel policies.

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: Client Care Payroll Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 03/2012 - 09/2014
DESCRIPTION: Provides customer services to support payroll reporting. Manages HR-related training programs and employee records.

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: Office Manager, Marketing Assistant, Customer Relations Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/2011 - 03/2012
DESCRIPTION: Develops marketing materials and manages budgets. Handles customer service inquiries and orders. Manages office operations.

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: Customer Support Representative
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/2004 - 10/2007
DESCRIPTION: Performs administrative and support duties in a call center. Heads the departmental activity committee.

SOURCE: 72231872.pdf
JOB TITLE: Senior Payroll Support Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 03/2008 - 07/2011
DESCRIPTION: Develops and administers payroll training. Assists in client confidentiality and personnel record maintenance.
